assumptions: Batch position is deterministically derived from global step.
The frozen base artifact is immutable and stored once per run.
CUDA RNG, gradient scaler, and sampler state are not applicable.

required_state.reason: All trainable residual-adapter parameters are needed to preserve completed updates.
AdamW state is needed for exact continuation without losing optimizer history.
LinearLR state is needed to preserve the learning-rate schedule.
The exact completed-step position and derived batch position must be restored.
Torch randomness, including dropout progression, must continue from the checkpoint.
The adapter must be restored against the exact immutable frozen base artifact.

restore_order_requirements: Validate the manifest, checksums, completion marker, and atomic commit status.
Validate the immutable base identity and base artifact hash.
Restore the frozen base, then the trainable adapter.
Restore Python, NumPy, and Torch RNG state before the next batch.
Keep all applicable Recovery Gate checks enabled; only deterministic code may declare recovery.
warnings: No rollback is permitted; a checkpoint failing any required integrity or identity check must not be accepted.
Recovery is not declared or verified by this contract.
Omitting the full frozen model is safe only when the exact base artifact identity and hash are validated.
RNG state must be restored before fetching or processing the next batch.
